intel.tagline: 1920's Taisho Roman inspired Japanese craft cocktail bar
intel.description: Bar Kamon is a speakeasy-style cocktail lounge located in the East Village of downtown San Diego, hidden behind a secret door at Asa Cafe and Bakery. The bar features a 1920s-inspired atmosphere with wood-paneled walls, vintage furnishings, and crystal chandeliers, serving innovative Japanese craft cocktails and Japanese cuisine. The venue is exclusively for ages 21+ and operates as a sophisticated lounge experience.
intel.social_proof: Team of experienced bartenders with 4-15 years of bartending experience each
intel.key_cta: Make a reservation or book a private event
intel.missing: No phone number, no email address, no online reservation system, no full menu displayed, no pricing information, no customer reviews or testimonials, no address details
intel.brand_vibe: Sophisticated 1920s speakeasy with Japanese influences and vintage elegance
intel.pain_point: No visible contact information or working reservation system makes it difficult for customers to actually book a table or event.
intel.chat_persona: Knowledgeable mixologist who embodies 1920s sophistication while showcasing Bar Kamon's unique Japanese-inspired craft cocktail experience and exclusive speakeasy ambiance.
intel.cta_angle: Reserve Your Table or Book a Private Event

email.body:
The hidden entrance behind Asa Cafe, the 1920s speakeasy vibe, bartenders with up to 15 years of experience — Bar Kamon has clearly nailed the atmosphere.

But right now, someone who discovers you online has no way to book a table, see your cocktail menu, or even find your address without digging.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that can answer questions about your Japanese cocktails, explain how to find the hidden entrance, and capture reservation requests 24/7.

intel.tagline: Fresh gourmet catering, cooked on site!
intel.description: Toast Catering is a San Diego-based full-service catering company that specializes in cooking food on-site for events. They serve weddings, corporate events, and private parties with high-quality gourmet meals prepared fresh. With over 15 years of experience, they focus on delivering bold, flavorful dishes at reasonable prices with professional service.
intel.social_proof: Over 15 years of experience. Multiple customer testimonials praising food quality and service. Guests specifically mentioned quality of food and happy with wedding service.
intel.key_cta: Call, email or contact us today for more information about catering your event
intel.missing: No online booking system, no detailed pricing information, no full menu displayed on homepage, no business hours listed, no physical address provided, no live chat option
intel.brand_vibe: Professional, warm, quality-focused, passionate about food
intel.pain_point: No clear online menu or pricing makes it difficult for potential customers to evaluate options without calling, creating friction in the decision-making process.
intel.chat_persona: Warm and professional catering consultant who understands event planning stress and asks thoughtful questions about guest count, event type, and food preferences to recommend the perfect menu.
intel.cta_angle: Get a Custom Catering Quote for Your Event

intel.tagline: Craft Beer • Local Food • San Diego Vibes
intel.description: Hidden Craft is a San Diego restaurant and craft beer bar featuring over 30 self-serve taps showcasing local breweries. They serve house-made food including tacos, bowls, and burgers designed to complement their rotating beer selections. The venue offers dine-in, takeout, catering, and private event hosting services.
intel.location: Corner India and C Street, San Diego, CA
intel.social_proof: Google reviews present with 5-star ratings. Praised for delicious food, clean atmosphere, pleasant service.
intel.key_cta: Order Online / Book a Table / Book a Party
intel.missing: Phone number not provided, email not listed, business hours not specified, complete menu not visible, pricing not shown
intel.brand_vibe: Casual yet refined, vibrant San Diego craft culture, community-focused
intel.pain_point: No phone number or direct contact information readily visible, forcing customers to use forms or social media for inquiries.
intel.chat_persona: Knowledgeable and friendly neighborhood guide who shares passion for local craft beer and house-made food while helping customers reserve tables, order food, or plan events.

intel.tagline: The World's Most Sustainable Vodka Company
intel.description: Misadventure & Co. produces carbon-negative vodka made from surplus baked goods, combining sustainability with craft spirits. They operate a tasting room in Vista, CA featuring cocktails, food, live music, and events. The brand celebrates memorable moments and proves that saving the world can be fun.
intel.location: 2420 Grand Ave. Suite C. Vista, CA 92081
intel.social_proof: Won 18 awards; first carbon negative consumer good; first and only spirit made from excess baked goods
intel.key_cta: Order Online or Visit Our Tasting Room
intel.missing: No email address provided for contact, no business hours listed, no customer testimonials or reviews, no social media links, no online booking system for events/reservations, limited product information
intel.brand_vibe: Fun, sustainable, retro adventure with eco-conscious values
intel.pain_point: The site lacks clear business hours and event booking details, making it difficult for customers to plan visits or reserve private events.
intel.chat_persona: A friendly, enthusiastic brand ambassador who celebrates sustainability and memorable moments while helping customers discover Misadventure's unique vodka and tasting room experience.
intel.cta_angle: Reserve a table or book a private event at the tasting room

email.subject_a: We built something for Misadventure & Co.
email.subject_b: Visitors can't book your tasting room online
email.subject_c: Turn surplus bread curiosity into tasting room visits
email.body:
Hey there,

Turning surplus baked goods into carbon-negative vodka is genuinely one of the more interesting things I've come across — 18 awards and the first carbon negative consumer good says you've nailed the product side. But when I visited your site, I couldn't find hours, book a tasting room visit, or even see a way to email you — that's a lot of friction for someone ready to show up in Vista.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that can answer questions about your spirits, share tasting room hours, and help visitors plan their visit 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/misadventure/index.html
